name: BlockAgent
description: Private DeFi Advisory Agent — confidential portfolio analysis via Venice AI (zero data retention), real token swaps via Uniswap API, verifiable execution via EigenCompute TEE. Discoverable on Base via x402 payments.
supportedTools: Venice AI (private inference, zero data retention)
Uniswap Developer Platform API (swap quotes + execution)
safetyGuardrails: All inference routed through Venice AI — zero data retention, prompts never stored
Swap execution requires explicit autoExecute flag — analysis-only by default
Wallet address validation before any onchain reads
Compute budget cap prevents runaway loops (max 20 tool calls per run)
All actions logged to agent_log.json for auditability

privacyArchitecture.inference: Venice AI — zero data retention, no prompt logging
privacyArchitecture.dataFlow: Onchain data (public) → Venice analysis (private, ephemeral) → User receives result
guarantees: Portfolio data never stored by inference provider
No third party can observe what portfolios are being analyzed
Analysis results are ephemeral — exist only during the request lifecycle
